name: beeper
description: Beeper Desktop MCP wrapper for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Read and manage Beeper chats from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Beeper is integrated here through the HomelabOps local plugin marketplace. The bundled MCP server points at Beeper Desktop on the MacBook over the tailnet and uses the server-managed CODEX_BEEPER_TOKEN secret.
